entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bicolor, the primary crop studied for nitrogen response.

entities.name: PIGEON PEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan, the crop intercropped with sorghum.

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: The nutrient applied to sorghum to study its response.

entities.name: VERTISOLS
entities.description: The type of soil in which the experiments were conducted.

entities.name: INTERCROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing sorghum and pigeon pea together in the same field.

entities.name: NITROGEN RESPONSE
entities.description: The reaction of sorghum to different levels of nitrogen application.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced, specifically mentioned for pigeon pea.
